accessibilityData.label: This is Adobe Live 1 minute, 13 seconds

runs.text:
Adobe Live hosts engaging daily livestreams and tailor-made content to teach you skills within the Creative Cloud apps. With our daily live streams, discover new techniques, and unlock valuable skills for your creative career.

Whether you're a beginner seeking exciting challenges or a seasoned pro hungry for masterclasses, Adobe Live has got you covered! Our diverse range of content ensures there's something valuable for everyone.

Subscribe to the Adobe Live channel for the opportunity to try out new tools, learn from pros and tailor your workflows to develop your unique style!

Now seamlessly integrated into Photoshop, Illustrator, Adobe Express, Premiere Pro, and more, it unlocks unprecedented levels of creativity in your workflow. Join us to learn from Adobe and AI experts on how to incorporate this powerful tool into your projects!

description.content: Join Adobe's vibrant community of creatives for an engaging daily livestream experience, tailor-made to elevate your skill set and cultivate new talents. With Adobe Live, we are on a mission to empower individuals like you to unleash your full creative potential.

accessibilityContext.label: Description. Join Adobe's vibrant community of creatives for an engaging ...tap for more.

title.simpleText: Adobe Live
Adobe Live

channelMetadataRenderer.title: Adobe Live
channelMetadataRenderer.description:
Join Adobe's vibrant community of creatives for an engaging daily livestream experience, tailor-made to elevate your skill set and cultivate new talents. With Adobe Live, we are on a mission to empower individuals like you to unleash your full creative potential.

🔍 Delve deeper into the wonders of your beloved Creative Cloud apps, discover hidden gems, and unlock new horizons. Our interactive sessions are crafted to offer you fresh insights and innovative approaches, so you can take your creativity to new heights.

💡 Whether you're a beginner seeking exciting challenges or a seasoned pro hungry for masterclasses, "Adobe Live" has got you covered! Our diverse range of content ensures there's something valuable for everyone.

🌟 Embrace the opportunity to amplify your creative endeavors, try out new tools, and tailor your workflows to suit your unique style and preferences. Let's embark on this journey together and find even more to love about the world of creativity.

runs.text: Seek to specific point in the video (7 advances to 70% of duration)
If the video supports captions, toggle captions ON/OFF
Rotate through different text opacity levels
Rotate through different window opacity levels

accessibilityData.label: Plus on number pad or right bracket
Minus on number pad or left bracket

runs.text: Check your connection and try again
Allow microphone access to search with voice
To search by voice, go to your browser settings and allow access to microphone

title.simpleText: Adobe Live

aboutChannelViewModel.description:
Join Adobe's vibrant community of creatives for an engaging daily livestream experience, tailor-made to elevate your skill set and cultivate new talents. With Adobe Live, we are on a mission to empower individuals like you to unleash your full creative potential.

🔍 Delve deeper into the wonders of your beloved Creative Cloud apps, discover hidden gems, and unlock new horizons. Our interactive sessions are crafted to offer you fresh insights and innovative approaches, so you can take your creativity to new heights.

💡 Whether you're a beginner seeking exciting challenges or a seasoned pro hungry for masterclasses, "Adobe Live" has got you covered! Our diverse range of content ensures there's something valuable for everyone.

🌟 Embrace the opportunity to amplify your creative endeavors, try out new tools, and tailor your workflows to suit your unique style and preferences. Let's embark on this journey together and find even more to love about the world of creativity.
